---
title: "Background"
pagetitle: "Background: Conferences on Teaching Statistics (COTS)"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-body">
<main class="content">
```

“Conferences On Teaching Statistics” (COTS) have a long and rich history, starting from the earliest such international conferences (International Conference on Teaching Statistics – ICOTS) in 1982 (Sheffield, UK) and 1986 (Victoria, Canada). 
A total of twelve ICOTS have been held, every four years since 1982, and a number of regional versions, including

- OZCOTS (Australia and NZ),
- USCOTS (United States),
- eCOTS,
- UKCOTS (United Kingdom),
- CFIES (France, Belgium)

have also been held.

The first edition of CANCOTS was held in Montreal in 2025 (https://cancots.netlify.app/)
